author: himanalot
name: 14L QEP GPTQ + Per-Window SGD TTT
blurb: 14-layer 512d GQA(8/4) transformer at critical depth. QEP-aware GPTQ int6 quantization (sequential block calibration with error propagation). Online score-first per-window SGD TTT at stride=76. EMA(0.997), Muon WD=0.09, leaky_relu(0.5)^2, BigramHash(8192x64), brotli-11 compression.
